# NixieClock partition table — 4MB flash: # One ~2.7MB factory app slot: huge headroom over the ~960KB the MQTT build uses
# so web UI + REST + alarm/RTTTL all fit with room to spare. No OTA slots — if we
# add OTA later this table changes and needs one more cabled flash.
# NVS stays at the default 0x9000 / 0x6000 so the settings + credentials the
# firmware stores survive this repartition (only phy_init moves
# 'storage' is a small SPIFFS area in case we serve web assets from a filesystem
# instead of embedding them in the binary.
